mapper.sql: orders.*, users.username AS customer_username, users.email AS customer_email, users.phone AS customer_phone, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orders.guest_order, FALSE) = TRUE OR orders.shipping_address LIKE '[Guest]%' OR users.status = 'GUEST' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS guest_order, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orders.guest_order, FALSE) = TRUE OR orders.shipping_address LIKE '[Guest]%' OR users.status = 'GUEST' THEN 'GUEST' ELSE 'REGISTERED' END AS customer_type, CASE WHEN COALESCE(orders.guest_order, FALSE) = TRUE OR orders.shipping_address LIKE '[Guest]%' OR users.status = 'GUEST' THEN COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(orders.recipient_name), ''), CASE WHEN orders.shipping_address LIKE '[Guest]%' THEN NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING(orders.shipping_address, 9), ' / ', 1)), '') ELSE NULL END, NULLIF(TRIM(users.email), ''), CONCAT('Guest #', orders.user_id) ) ELSE COALESCE( NULLIF(TRIM(users.username), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(users.email), ''), CONCAT('User #', orders.user_id) ) END AS customer_display_name
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PENDING_SHIPMENT', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) FROM orders
SELECT COALESCE(status, 'UNKNOWN') AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM orders GROUP BY COALESCE(status, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY count DESC, status ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('PENDING_SHIPMENT', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') THEN 1 END) AS paidOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PENDING_SHIPMENT', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS netRevenue, COUNT(CASE WHEN status IN ('REFUNDED', 'RETURNED') OR refunded_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS refundedOrders, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('REFUNDED', 'RETURNED') OR refunded_at IS NOT NULL THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refundedAmount, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(original_amount, total_amount, 0)), 0) AS grossOrderAmount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS cancelledOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' THEN 1 END) AS pendingPaymentOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' THEN 1 END) AS pendingShipmentOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SHIPPED' THEN 1 END) AS shippedOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SHIPPED' AND tracking_number IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(tracking_number) != '' THEN 1 END) AS ordersWithTracking, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SHIPPED' AND (tracking_number IS NULL OR TRIM(tracking_number) = '') THEN 1 END) AS ordersWithoutTracking, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) AS completedOrders, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND created_at < DATE_SUB(#{now}, INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) THEN 1 END) AS stalePendingPayment, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND COALESCE(updated_at, created_at) < DATE_SUB(#{now}, INTERVAL 24 HOUR) THEN 1 END) AS delayedShipment, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RETURN_APPROVED' AND COALESCE(return_approved_at, updated_at) < DATE_SUB(#{now}, INTERVAL 3 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS returnAwaitingShipment, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' AND COALESCE(return_shipped_at, updated_at) < DATE_SUB(#{now}, INTERVAL 24 HOUR) THEN 1 END) AS refundDue FROM orders

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS trendDate, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('PENDING_SHIPMENT', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{endExclusive} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY trendDate ASC

SELECT payment_method AS paymentMethod, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM orders WHERE status IN ('PENDING_SHIPMENT', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') AND payment_method IS NOT NULL AND payment_method != '' GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY orderCount DESC, paymentMethod ASC

where.if: AND ( CAST(orders.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR CAST(orders.user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.shipping_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.recipient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.recipient_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.contact_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.payment_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.tracking_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.tracking_carrier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.return_tracking_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.return_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR users.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR users.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR users.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' )

choose.when: AND ( (orders.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND orders.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)) OR (orders.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND COALESCE(orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_requested_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_APPROVED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_approved_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_shipped_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) )
AND orders.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND orders.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)
AND orders.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND COALESCE(orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)
AND orders.status = 'RETURN_APPROVED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_approved_at, orders.updated_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
AND orders.status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_shipped_at, orders.updated_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)

AND ( (orders.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND orders.created_at BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 20 MINUTE)) OR (orders.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND COALESCE(orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_requested_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_APPROVED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_approved_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_shipped_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR)) )
AND orders.status = 'SHIPPED' AND (orders.tracking_number IS NULL OR TRIM(orders.tracking_number) = '')
AND (orders.status IN ('REFUNDED', 'RETURNED') OR orders.refunded_at IS NOT NULL)
AND ( orders.status = 'RETURN_REFUNDING' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.order_id = orders.id AND p.status = 'REFUNDING' ) )
AND ( orders.status IN ('RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.order_id = orders.id AND p.status = 'REFUNDING' ) )

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM orders LEFT JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id ORDER BY orders.created_at DESC, orders.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders LEFT JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.status IN ('PENDING_PAYMENT', 'PENDING_SHIPMENT', 'RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED') THEN 1 END) AS NEEDS_ACTION, COUNT(CASE WHEN ( (orders.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND orders.created_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE)) OR (orders.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND COALESCE(orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_requested_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_APPROVED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_approved_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_shipped_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR)) ) THEN 1 END) AS SLA_OVERDUE, COUNT(CASE WHEN ( (orders.status = 'PENDING_PAYMENT' AND orders.created_at BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 20 MINUTE)) OR (orders.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' AND COALESCE(orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_requested_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_APPROVED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_approved_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)) OR (orders.status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' AND COALESCE(orders.return_shipped_at, orders.updated_at, orders.created_at) BETWEEN DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) AND DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 18 HOUR)) ) THEN 1 END) AS SLA_DUE_SOON, COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'SHIPPED' AND (orders.tracking_number IS NULL OR TRIM(orders.tracking_number) = '') THEN 1 END) AS MISSING_TRACKING, COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'PENDING_SHIPMENT' THEN 1 END) AS PENDING_SHIPMENT, COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED' THEN 1 END) AS RETURN_REQUESTED, COUNT(CASE WHEN orders.status = 'RETURN_SHIPPED' THEN 1 END) AS RETURN_SHIPPED, COUNT(CASE WHEN ( orders.status IN ('RETURN_REQUESTED', 'RETURN_APPROVED', 'RETURN_SHIPPED', 'RETURN_REFUNDING') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.order_id = orders.id AND p.status = 'REFUNDING' ) ) THEN 1 END) AS AFTER_SALES, COUNT(CASE WHEN ( orders.status = 'RETURN_REFUNDING' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.order_id = orders.id AND p.status = 'REFUNDING' ) ) THEN 1 END) AS REFUNDING, COUNT(CASE WHEN (orders.status IN ('REFUNDED', 'RETURNED') OR orders.refunded_at IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS REFUNDED FROM orders
LEFT JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id
AND ( CAST(orders.id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR CAST(orders.user_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.shipping_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.recipient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.recipient_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.contact_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.payment_method LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.tracking_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.tracking_carrier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.return_tracking_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR orders.return_reason LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR users.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR users.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' OR users.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') ESCAPE '!' )

SELECT
FROM orders LEFT JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id WHERE orders.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM orders LEFT JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id WHERE orders.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT
FROM orders LEFT JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id WHERE orders.order_no = #{orderNo} AND ( LOWER(TRIM(users.email)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{email})) OR LOWER(TRIM(orders.contact_email)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{email})) OR ( orders.shipping_address LIKE '[Guest]%' AND #{emailLike} IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(orders.shipping_address) LIKE CONCAT('% / ', LOWER(#{emailLike}), ' /%') ESCAPE '!' ) ) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, original_amount, discount_amount, shipping_fee, total_amount, user_coupon_id, coupon_id, coupon_name, status, shipping_address, recipient_name, recipient_phone, contact_email, guest_order, payment_method, tracking_number, tracking_carrier_code, tracking_carrier_name, return_tracking_number, return_reason, return_requested_at, return_approved_at, return_rejected_at, return_shipped_at, returned_at, refunded_at, shipped_at, completed_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{originalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{shippingFee}, #{totalAmount}, #{userCouponId}, #{couponId}, #{couponName}, #{status}, #{shippingAddress}, #{recipientName}, #{recipientPhone}, #{contactEmail}, COALESCE(#{guestOrder}, FALSE), #{paymentMethod}, #{trackingNumber}, #{trackingCarrierCode}, #{trackingCarrierName}, #{returnTrackingNumber}, #{returnReason}, #{returnRequestedAt}, #{returnApprovedAt}, #{returnRejectedAt}, #{returnShippedAt}, #{returnedAt}, #{refundedAt}, #{shippedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_no = #{orderNo}, user_id = #{userId}, original_amount = #{originalAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, shipping_fee = #{shippingFee}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId}, coupon_id = #{couponId}, coupon_name = #{couponName}, status = #{status}, shipping_address = #{shippingAddress}, recipient_name = #{recipientName}, recipient_phone = #{recipientPhone}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, guest_order = COALESCE(#{guestOrder}, FALSE), payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}, tracking_carrier_code = #{trackingCarrierCode}, tracking_carrier_name = #{trackingCarrierName}, return_tracking_number = #{returnTrackingNumber}, return_reason = #{returnReason}, return_requested_at = #{returnRequestedAt}, return_approved_at = #{returnApprovedAt}, return_rejected_at = #{returnRejectedAt}, return_shipped_at = #{returnShippedAt}, returned_at = #{returnedAt}, refunded_at = #{refundedAt}, shipped_at = #{shippedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()) ELSE completed_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, completed_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()) ELSE completed_at END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'RETURN_REQUESTED', return_reason = #{reason}, return_requested_at = NOW(), return_rejected_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'COMPLETED', return_rejected_at = NOW(), completed_at = COALESCE(completed_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}

UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, tracking_number = #{trackingNumber}, tracking_carrier_code = #{trackingCarrierCode}, tracking_carrier_name = #{trackingCarrierName}, shipped_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, return_tracking_number = #{returnTrackingNumber}, return_shipped_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
UPDATE orders SET status = 'RETURNED', returned_at = NOW(), refunded_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{currentStatus}
